name: reactivity-architecture-decision
description: Current PlatformFeaturesPage uses useState + manual fetch which is NOT reactive. For real-time updates requirement, need to choose: (1) Polling with setInterval, (2) Create platformFeaturesDomain MST store, (3) WebSocket/SSE for server push. Option 2 is most aligned with codebase patterns but requires new domain.
recommendation: Start with polling (simple), consider MST domain later if latency is an issue. MCP SSE already exists in mcpService.
